body_preview: - Day 125 (17:27) assessment phase produced `session_plan/assessment_missing.md` (exit_code=0, no provider errors, but no assessment.md written). - The preseed script (`scripts/preseed_session_plan.py`) has no explicit handling for the "assessment missing" case — it uses assessment text when available but doesn't detect or react to `assessment_missing.md`. -
expected_evidence: After this fix, future assessment-missing sessions get preseed tasks with narrower scope. The preseed script's `--test` output shows the assessment_missing detection path works. Implementation: In `scripts/preseed_session_plan.py`, near where the assessment text is loaded, add a check for `session_plan/assessment_missing.md`. When found, set a flag (e.g., `a
title: Make preseed fallback use assessment_missing artifact when assessment phase fails
